question: What two abilities are granted by Shadowmere 'Void-Cloaks'?

answers.original:
Void-Cloaks grant the abilities of phase-shifting and shadow-melding.

### References

- [1] Void-Cloaks are garments that allow the wearer to partially phase out of physical reality and meld with shadows.
- [2] Void-Cloaks are crafted in Shadowmere and allow wearers to phase-shift and shadow-meld.
- [3] Void-Cloaks enable the wearer to phase-shift, creating a translucent appearance.
- [4] Void-Cloaks allow the wearer to shadow-meld, becoming one with darkness.

entities.name: Void-Cloaks
entities.description: Void-Cloaks are garments that allow the wearer to partially phase out of physical reality and meld with shadows.

entities.name: Shadowmere
entities.description: Shadowmere is a realm characterized by perpetual twilight.

entities.name: Elite Shadowmere Agents
entities.description: Elite Shadowmere Agents are individuals who wear Void-Cloaks and are involved in Shadowmere politics.

relations.description: Void-Cloaks are crafted in Shadowmere and allow wearers to phase-shift and shadow-meld.
Elite Shadowmere Agents wear Void-Cloaks to perform their duties.
The Umbral-Weavers craft the finest Void-Cloaks.
Void-Cloaks enable the wearer to phase-shift, creating a translucent appearance.
Void-Cloaks allow the wearer to shadow-meld, becoming one with darkness.
